tasks.subject: Task 1: SSO + pushnotify HTTP 클라이언트 타임아웃
tasks.description:
**Goal:** http.DefaultClient 사용처에 타임아웃 클라이언트 주입

**Files:**
- Modify: internal/sso/verify.go
- Modify: internal/pushnotify/pushnotify.go

**Verify:** go test ./internal/sso/... ./internal/pushnotify/... -v

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/sso/verify.go","internal/pushnotify/pushnotify.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./internal/sso/... ./internal/pushnotify/... -v","acceptanceCriteria":["sso/verify.go에서 http.DefaultClient 제거","pushnotify에서 http.DefaultClient 7곳 모두 제거","테스트 통과"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: os.Getenv — config 패키지 밖 직접 사용 제거
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 4개 env var를 config.Config 구조체로 이동

**Files:**
- Modify: internal/config/config.go
- Modify: internal/apikeys/middleware.go
- Modify: internal/mailservice/systememail.go
- Modify: internal/httpapi/admin_auth.go

**Verify:** go build ./... && grep -rn "os.Getenv" internal/ --include="*.go" | grep -v "_test.go" | grep -v "config/"

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/config/config.go","internal/apikeys/middleware.go","internal/mailservice/systememail.go","internal/httpapi/admin_auth.go"],"verifyCommand":"go build ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["os.Getenv 제거","config.Config 필드 추가","go build 통과"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: JMAP types.go panic 제거
tasks.description:
**Goal:** mustRawString의 panic을 strconv.AppendQuote fallback으로 교체

**Files:**
- Modify: internal/jmap/types.go

**Verify:** grep -n "panic" internal/jmap/types.go; go test ./internal/jmap/... -v

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/jmap/types.go"],"verifyCommand":"grep -n \"panic\" internal/jmap/types.go; go test ./internal/jmap/... -v","acceptanceCriteria":["panic 제거","테스트 통과"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: CI 품질 게이트 강화
tasks.description:
**Goal:** golangci-lint, govulncheck CI 추가, docker-image 의존성 수정

**Files:**
- Create: .golangci.yml
- Modify: .github/workflows/ci.yml

**Verify:** cat .golangci.yml | grep -E "errcheck|staticcheck|gosec"

```json:metadata
{"files":[".golangci.yml",".github/workflows/ci.yml"],"verifyCommand":"cat .golangci.yml | grep -E \"errcheck|staticcheck|gosec\"","acceptanceCriteria":[".golangci.yml 생성","CI go-lint 추가","CI go-vuln 추가","docker-image needs 수정"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: context.Background() → caller context 전파
tasks.description:
**Goal:** service 코드의 context.Background() → caller ctx 전파

**Files:**
- Modify: internal/batchlock/batchlock.go
- Modify: internal/idprovider/rdbms/validator.go
- Modify: internal/mailservice/pop3_adapter.go
- Modify: internal/sso/verify.go

**Verify:** go test ./internal/batchlock/... ./internal/idprovider/... ./internal/sso/... -v

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/batchlock/batchlock.go","internal/idprovider/rdbms/validator.go","internal/mailservice/pop3_adapter.go","internal/sso/verify.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./internal/batchlock/... ./internal/idprovider/... ./internal/sso/... -v","acceptanceCriteria":["caller ctx 전파","shutdown context 유지","테스트 통과"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: 핵심 패키지 에러 래핑
tasks.description:
**Goal:** jmap, mailservice, httpapi의 bare return err → fmt.Errorf 래핑

**Files:**
- Modify: internal/jmap/*.go
- Modify: internal/mailservice/service.go
- Modify: internal/httpapi/mail.go

**Verify:** grep -rn "return err$" internal/jmap/ --include="*.go" | grep -v "_test.go"; go test ./internal/jmap/... -v

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/jmap/","internal/mailservice/service.go","internal/httpapi/mail.go"],"verifyCommand":"grep -rn \"return err$\" internal/jmap/ --include=\"*.go\" | grep -v \"_test.go\"","acceptanceCriteria":["jmap bare return err 0건","mailservice exported 함수 래핑","테스트 통과"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: internal/app/run.go 서브시스템 파일 분리
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 4047줄 run.go → 서브시스템별 파일 분리, 2000줄 이하

**Files:**
- Modify: internal/app/run.go
- Create: internal/app/run_batch.go, run_imap.go, run_pop3.go, run_dav.go, run_ldap.go, run_smtp.go, run_http.go

**Verify:** wc -l internal/app/run.go; go test ./internal/app/... -timeout=120s

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/app/run.go"],"verifyCommand":"wc -l internal/app/run.go; go test ./internal/app/... -timeout=120s","acceptanceCriteria":["run.go 2000줄 이하","서브시스템 파일 생성","테스트 통과"]}
```
